title: SQLite schema creation and destruction helpers for pseudo DB schema v6
purpose: Provides functions to initialize and clean up the database schema for the pseudo DB, including all tables, indexes, and FTS5 virtual table definitions.
module_context: Exports SCHEMA_VERSION constant and DDL/DROP_DDL strings containing complete SQL definitions for the schema. Defines createSchema() and dropSchema() functions that execute the DDL and DROP_DDL statements against a database connection.

steps.content: Execute the complete DDL string to create all tables, indexes, and the FTS5 virtual table.
Ensure all schema objects are created only if they do not already exist.
Execute the complete DROP_DDL string to remove all schema objects in reverse dependency order.
Ensure all schema objects are dropped only if they exist.
